notes_for_human_reviewer: Floor submission. Accepts the 8-day single-team estimate at face value, endorses Tier 1 PM-approve routing, misses the V. Bauer prior-scope decision, misses the CRM external dependency, misses the critical-path impact, misses the J. Patel-vs-A. Wong stakeholder dynamic, misses the empty-change-log signal entirely. LinkedIn-speak ('leverage clear stakeholder communication'). 'Quick and pragmatic' as endorsement of speed over rigour. Every dim floors at 1 because the submission actively defends every named anti-pattern. This is the coordinator who has internalised that surfacing complexity is unhelpful and that speed is the deliverable.
